## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests run
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior changed)

## Protocol/Spec Checklist

- [ ] No protocol field/wire changes
- [ ] If protocol changed: RFC/schema/fixtures/conformance updated
- [ ] If relay behavior changed: RFC-0004 + conformance updated
- [ ] If identity behavior changed: RFC-0002 + conformance updated

## Release Safety

- [ ] No production-readiness overclaims introduced
- [ ] v0.1.0-alpha caveats still accurate
